_publications._publicationTitle: Exploring transcriptional regulators Ref-1 and STAT3 as therapeutic targets in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumours.

_contextSnippet: There was a dose-dependent decrease in cell proliferation with both drugs...A reduction of at least 2-fold in phosphorylated STAT3 (Y705) was observed with both Rux and Napa
details: Dose-dependent decrease in cell proliferation and reduction of at least 2-fold in phosphorylated STAT3 (Y705) in NF90-8 cells
